description: Smithery is a platform for discovering, connecting to, and publishing MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and related agent skills. It manages connections, credentials, tokens, and hosted or uplinked access to MCP tools for AI agents and applications.
summary: Smithery exposes a documented REST Platform API at https://api.smithery.ai with an OpenAPI spec, an MCP endpoint for its documentation at https://smithery.ai/docs/mcp, and an npm-distributed `smithery` CLI.
